fields.name: headline
fields.notes: Short, direct. Must not start with 'Your digital closing is ready'. Standard: 'Welcome to your digital closing'.

fields.name: summary
fields.notes: 1–2 sentences framing the email. Optional — headline may be sufficient on its own.

fields.name: capabilities_items
fields.rawShape: String — intro line + bullet lines prefixed with '• '
fields.rawExample:
With this experience, you'll be able to:
• Review your closing documents online
• Securely eSign most documents
• Spend less time at your in-person signing appointment
fields.parsingNote: Strip the intro line ('With this experience, you'll be able to:'), split on newline, strip '• ' prefix, reject blank lines. New model method needed.

fields.name: closing_info_details
fields.rawExample:
• Date: March 15, 2024
• Time: 2:00 PM EST
• Property address: 123 Main St
fields.validationNote: Required by template validation (runSectionValidation). HAML guards defensively with .present? in case bypassed.
fields.parsingNote: Parse each '• Label: value' line into a hash. Lines that don't match the pattern are dropped. New model method needed.
fields.rubyMethod:
def closing_info_details
  return [] unless closing_info.present?
  closing_info.split("\n").filter_map do |line|
    m = line.strip.match(/^•\s*(.+?):\s*(.+)$/)
    { label: m[1].strip, value: m[2].strip } if m
  end
end

fields.name: timeline_steps
fields.rawExample:
• Review your documents online
• Complete your eSign documents
• Attend your in-person signing appointment
• Your closing is complete
fields.validationNote: Required by template validation (runSectionValidation). HAML guards defensively with .present? in case bypassed.
fields.parsingNote: Split on newline, strip '• ' prefix, reject blank lines. New model method needed.
fields.rubyMethod:
def timeline_steps
  return [] unless timeline.present?
  timeline.split("\n")
          .map { |l| l.strip.sub(/^•\s*/, '') }
          .reject(&:blank?)
end

fields.name: security_note
fields.rawShape: String — security prose + '\nLearn more about digital closings in the Borrower Resource Center →' as literal text
fields.rawExample:
Your closing documents are shared through Snapdocs, a secure platform used by Acme Bank.
Learn more about digital closings in the Borrower Resource Center →
fields.parsingNote: Return only the prose lines — exclude any line matching 'Borrower Resource Center'. The resource link is rendered explicitly in the HAML as a link_to, not embedded in this field. New model method needed.
fields.rubyMethod:
def security_note
  return nil unless reassurance.present?
  reassurance.split("\n")
             .reject { |l| l.match?(/Borrower Resource Center/i) }
             .join(' ').strip.presence
end

fields.name: borrower_resource_center_url
fields.engineeringNote: Must be defined as a named route helper or a constant before the HAML can render. If the route does not exist yet, use a temporary constant: BORROWER_RESOURCE_CENTER_URL = 'https://snapdocs.com/borrower-resources' and replace with the correct named route once confirmed.

fields.name: contact_guidance
fields.value: If you have questions, contact your lender.
fields.notes: Hardcoded in the HAML — not a model field. Do not pass through Claude output or a dynamic accessor.

excludedFields.name: next_steps
excludedFields.reason: Onboarding is not action_required. No next steps block is rendered.

excludedFields.name: key_details / key_details_title
excludedFields.reason: Closing details are rendered via closing_info_details as a structured dl. Generic key_details block is not used.

excludedFields.name: lender_team
excludedFields.reason: Not part of the locked signer onboarding structure.

excludedFields.name: reply_guidance
excludedFields.reason: No reply path in signer onboarding. Excluded entirely.

excludedFields.name: info_sections
excludedFields.reason: Generic section loop replaced by four explicit locked section accessors.
